verifier_packages.description: Passes when target output contains the SHA-1 digest of source.
verifier_packages.verify_py:
import hashlib
import json
import re
import sys

request = json.load(sys.stdin)
verifier_id = request["verifier"]["id"]
inputs = request.get("inputs") or {}

def fail(code, message):
    print(json.dumps({"passed": False, "error": {"code": code, "message": message}}))
    sys.exit(0)

def passed(content):
    print(json.dumps({"passed": True, "evidence": [{"id": verifier_id, "type": verifier_id, "content": content}], "outputs": content}))
    sys.exit(0)

source = inputs.get("source")
target = inputs.get("target")
if not source or not target:
    fail("missing_input", "source and target are required")
hasher = hashlib.sha1()
with open(source, "rb") as handle:
    hasher.update(handle.read())
expected = hasher.hexdigest()
with open(target, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore") as handle:
    content = handle.read()
match = re.search(r"\b[0-9a-fA-F]{40}\b", content)
if not match:
    fail("missing_sha1", "target does not contain a SHA-1 digest")
actual = match.group(0).lower()
if actual != expected:
    fail("sha1_mismatch", "target digest does not match source")
passed({"source": source, "target": target, "algorithm": "sha1"})

candidates.description: Compute the SHA-1 digest of a file.
